title: Chapter 91
content:
Chapter 91: Chapter 91: Mission’s Reward [1]

[You took away the chastity of an elder of a sect, +10000 lust points]

[You took away the chastity of a woman who stronger that you, +10000 lust points]

[You fucked a stronger woman that love you, +500oo lust points]

[You had intense sex with a stronger woman that love you, +500oo lust points]

[You made a stronger woman that love you climax multiple times, +700oo lust points]

[You cum inside a stronger woman that love you multiple times, +700oo lust points]

[Selene’s Interest has increased tremendously! +600oo lust points]

[...]

...

...

A flurry of notifications reached Damon as he finished with Selene. Along with it a new notification also appeared.

[Ding!]

[Ding!]

[Mission: Claim Selene Frostborn’s Chastity.] [Completed]

[Reward: 1,000,000 lust points.]

[Bonus Mission: Claim Selene Frostborn’s Chastity with out using any ability.] [Completed]

[Bonus Reward: New Bloodline and physique for Selene Frostborn.]

[Mission Completed! Would you like to receive the rewards? Or wait until the bonus mission is completed?]

’Yes’

[You receive 1,000,000 lust points.]

[You receive a Ice Goddess Bloodline.]

[You receive a Ice Goddess Physique.]

[Ice Goddess Bloodline]

[Description: A blood of Goddess who embodied the element of Ice, she was the one who born form ice and become its representative.]

[Mortal Grade - Low]

[Ice Goddess Physique]

[Description: A body of Goddess who embodied the element of Ice, she was the one who born form ice and become its representative.]

[Mortal Grade - Low]

Looking at the reward, he smile then he look at the sleeping Selene on his chest.

’System, if i give her the bloodline and the physique, what happen to her old one?’

[It will be replace with the new one, but since her physique was Body of Ice Monarch, you can say it was the lower grade of Ice goddess. If you give it to her now she won’t feel anything at all, because it’s just like she upgrade her physique and get a bloodline as a bonus.]

’I see, then its good so she didn’t have too felt that pain of her body being destroyed and rebuild like the other.’

Damon than look at Selene who sleeping peacefully and hugged her. Then he began integrated the new physique and bloodline while also transfer the Yin-Yang Harem Scripture.

The integration only last a few minute. Just like the system said because she already had a physique that similar with the new one that Damon gave, she didn’t feel a thing.

[Ice Goddess Bloodline was successfully integrated into Selene Frostborn.]

[Ice Goddess Physique was successfully integrated into Selene Frostborn.]

But because the surge of energy that she felt, she slowly open her eyes.

Damon just greet her with a smile.

"Morning, my lovely elder."

Hearing Damon voice, Selene couldn’t help but to blush remembering everything that just happen. She couldn’t believe how she change drastically.

She recalled her flawless porcelain face often masked in stoic indifference now softening with blush as memories of their passionate night resurfaced mixing her obsession for rivals with this unexpected craving as his woman.

From a woman who don’t care anything except sword, become a woman who shallowed by her own lust. She was called genius, because she able to learn anything about sword with a fast pace.

She able to master sword the moment she pick up a sword when she just 10 years old.

From then everything when smoothly, she able to learn any sword technique and even manifest he own sword intent at the age of 30.

But everything went south after that. She stuck at Ninth Level of Heavenly Spirit Realm and her sword didn’t progress at all. But she didn’t give up the keep trying.

She was know as the youngest sword master in the eastern continent, she was proud and believe that she can do anything.

Even this already amazing feat to other people to her it feels like she facing a big unbreakable wall. That why she looking for a rival that match her talent, she thought if he met a rival it can help her with her trouble.

Then she met Damon. He was everything that she was looking for. A man that have a same talent even higher than her.

While she lost in her inner thought, she suddenly felt some thing different wit her body and new information inside her head.

Her voluptuous mature figure trembled slightly as she felt the new Bloodline and Physique.

Her mind flooded with new information about Yin-Yang Harem Scripture. A Dual Cultivation technique that she never knew, and how heaven deying the technique was.

"What?" As she look at Damon.

"It’s was a gift from me. Try it."

Selene simply nodded and follow Damon instruction.

Then she started to sit cross-legged and close her eyes while she still naked. Following the scripture, she started to absorb and refine the yang qi inside her womb.

Just a few moment, a burst aura come out from Selene. Her aura change from Heavenly Spirit Realm to King Spirit Realm.

After a half hour, finally her aura began to settle down and she slowly open her eye.

She look at Damon and jump to him, she give him a hug and a barrage of kiss.

"Thank you, Damon... you really don’t know what it meant for me..."

Hearing her saying that, Damon couldn’t help but curious about it. But he let it go.

"Of course, You are now my woman, I will do anything for you..."

"Go continue cultivating, you can tell your story when you are ready."

Selene nodded and began to cultivate again to stabilize her cultivation.

While at it Damon look at her new status.

[Name: Selene Frostborn]

[Age: 35]

[Cultivation: King Spirit Realm - First Level]

[Relationship: In Love]

[Interest: 700/100o]

[Chastity: Claim by Damon Arcknight]

[Lust: 0/100]

[Affinities: Ice: 100, Sword: 100]

[Spiritual Roots: Glacial Sword Spiritual Roots] [Heaven Grade - Low]

[Bloodline: Blood of Ice Goddess] [Mortal Grade - Low]

[Physique: Body of Ice Goddess] [Mortal Grade - Low]

[Traits: Cold, Sword Freak, Proud, Natural Sword Master, Cold Outside Soft Inside]
